targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT sid) as "Stations" FROM block_power_status WHERE $__timeFilter(ts)
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT sid) as "Critical" FROM block_health_summary WHERE overall_status = 'critical' AND $__timeFilter(ts)
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT sid) as "Warnings" FROM block_health_summary WHERE overall_status = 'warning' AND $__timeFilter(ts)

SELECT DISTINCT ON (p.sid)
  p.sid as "Station",
  p.voltage as "Voltage",
  hs.overall_status as "Status",
  p.ts as "Last Update",
  (SELECT MIN(p2.voltage) FROM block_power_status p2 WHERE p2.sid = p.sid AND $__timeFilter(p2.ts)) as "Min Voltage",
  (SELECT MAX(p2.voltage) FROM block_power_status p2 WHERE p2.sid = p.sid AND $__timeFilter(p2.ts)) as "Max Voltage"
FROM block_power_status p
LEFT JOIN block_health_summary hs ON p.sid = hs.sid AND p.ts = hs.ts
WHERE $__timeFilter(p.ts)
  AND hs.overall_status IN ('critical', 'warning')
ORDER BY p.sid, p.ts DESC

SELECT DISTINCT ON (p.sid)
  p.sid as "Station",
  p.voltage as "Voltage",
  hs.overall_status as "Status",
  p.ts as "Last Update"
FROM block_power_status p
LEFT JOIN block_health_summary hs ON p.sid = hs.sid AND p.ts = hs.ts
WHERE $__timeFilter(p.ts)
ORDER BY p.sid, p.ts DESC

SELECT
  p.ts AS time,
  p.sid AS metric,
  p.voltage AS value
FROM block_power_status p
JOIN stations s ON s.sid = p.sid
WHERE $__timeFilter(p.ts)
  AND COALESCE(s.power_type, 'battery') != 'mains'
ORDER BY p.ts

SELECT voltage as "Voltage"
FROM block_power_status
WHERE sid = '$station'
  AND $__timeFilter(ts)
ORDER BY ts DESC
LIMIT 1
SELECT COALESCE((SELECT temperature FROM block_receiver_status WHERE sid = '$station' AND temperature IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1), -1) AS "Temperature"
SELECT COALESCE((SELECT cpu_load FROM block_receiver_status WHERE sid = '$station' AND cpu_load IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1), -1) AS "CPU"
SELECT COALESCE((SELECT usage_percent FROM block_disk_status WHERE sid = '$station' ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1), -1) AS "Disk"

SELECT total AS "Satellites"
FROM block_satellite_tracking
WHERE sid = '$station'
ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT gps AS "GPS", glonass AS "GLO", galileo AS "GAL", beidou AS "BDS"
FROM block_satellite_tracking
WHERE sid = '$station'
ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT CASE overall_status
  WHEN 'healthy' THEN 0
  WHEN 'warning' THEN 1
  WHEN 'critical' THEN 2
  ELSE 3
END AS "Status",
CASE WHEN status_details IS NOT NULL
  THEN status_details
  ELSE ''
END AS "Details"
FROM block_health_summary
WHERE sid = '$station'
ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1

panels.title: Overall Status
panels.description: Details field shows what is causing non-healthy status (e.g. 'Voltage, FTP down')

targets.rawSql:
SELECT uptime_seconds AS "Uptime"
FROM block_receiver_status
WHERE sid = '$station' AND uptime_seconds IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT round(latitude::numeric, 4) AS "Lat", round(longitude::numeric, 4) AS "Lon", fix_type AS "Fix"
FROM block_pvt_geodetic
WHERE sid = '$station'
ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT extract(epoch from now() - max(latest_ts))::integer AS "Age"
FROM (
  SELECT max(ts) AS latest_ts FROM block_health_summary WHERE sid = '$station'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT max(ts) FROM block_power_status WHERE sid = '$station'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT max(ts) FROM block_receiver_status WHERE sid = '$station'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT max(ts) FROM block_pvt_geodetic WHERE sid = '$station'
) t

SELECT
  CASE WHEN ftp_port IS NULL THEN -1 WHEN ftp_open THEN ftp_port ELSE 0 END AS "FTP",
  CASE WHEN http_port IS NULL THEN -1 WHEN http_open THEN http_port ELSE 0 END AS "HTTP",
  CASE WHEN control_port IS NULL THEN -1 WHEN control_open THEN control_port ELSE 0 END AS "Ctrl"
FROM block_health_summary
WHERE sid = '$station'
ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT
  (SELECT CASE
    WHEN NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM file_tracking WHERE sid='$station' AND session_type='15s_24hr' AND status='downloaded') THEN -1
    ELSE (SELECT ROUND(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM NOW() - (file_date + INTERVAL '1 day')))
          FROM file_tracking WHERE sid='$station' AND session_type='15s_24hr'
          AND status='downloaded' ORDER BY file_date DESC LIMIT 1)
  END) AS "24h",
  (SELECT CASE
    WHEN NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM file_tracking WHERE sid='$station' AND session_type='1Hz_1hr' AND status='downloaded') THEN -1
    ELSE (SELECT ROUND(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM NOW() - (file_date + file_hour * INTERVAL '1 hour')))
          FROM file_tracking WHERE sid='$station' AND session_type='1Hz_1hr'
          AND status='downloaded' ORDER BY file_date DESC, file_hour DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 1)
  END) AS "1Hz",
  (SELECT CASE
    WHEN NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM file_tracking WHERE sid='$station' AND session_type='status_1hr' AND status='downloaded') THEN -1
    ELSE (SELECT ROUND(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM NOW() - (file_date + file_hour * INTERVAL '1 hour')))
          FROM file_tracking WHERE sid='$station' AND session_type='status_1hr'
          AND status='downloaded' ORDER BY file_date DESC, file_hour DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 1)
  END) AS "Status"

SELECT
  (SELECT CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM file_tracking WHERE sid='$station' AND session_type='15s_24hr' AND status='downloaded') THEN 1 ELSE -1 END) AS "15s",
  (SELECT CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM file_tracking WHERE sid='$station' AND session_type='1Hz_1hr' AND status='downloaded') THEN 1 ELSE -1 END) AS "1Hz",
  (SELECT CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM file_tracking WHERE sid='$station' AND session_type='status_1hr' AND status='downloaded') THEN 1 ELSE -1 END) AS "Status"

SELECT CASE status
  WHEN 'connected' THEN 0
  WHEN 'connecting' THEN 1
  WHEN 'idle' THEN 2
  WHEN 'inactive' THEN 4
  WHEN 'error' THEN 3
  ELSE 2
END AS "RTK"
FROM (
  SELECT status, ts FROM block_ntrip_client WHERE sid = '$station'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT status, ts FROM block_ntrip_server WHERE sid = '$station'
) ntrip
ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT
  ts AS time,
  voltage AS "Voltage"
FROM block_power_status
WHERE sid = '$station'
  AND $__timeFilter(ts)
ORDER BY ts

SELECT
  p.ts AS "Time",
  p.voltage AS "Voltage",
  r.temperature AS "Temperature",
  r.cpu_load AS "CPU",
  d.usage_percent AS "Disk",
  sat.total AS "Satellites",
  hs.overall_status AS "Status"
FROM block_power_status p
LEFT JOIN block_receiver_status r ON p.sid = r.sid AND p.ts = r.ts
LEFT JOIN block_disk_status d ON p.sid = d.sid AND p.ts = d.ts
LEFT JOIN block_satellite_tracking sat ON p.sid = sat.sid AND p.ts = sat.ts
LEFT JOIN block_health_summary hs ON p.sid = hs.sid AND p.ts = hs.ts
WHERE p.sid = '$station'
  AND $__timeFilter(p.ts)
ORDER BY p.ts DESC
LIMIT 100

list.definition: SELECT sid FROM stations ORDER BY sid
list.label: Station
list.name: station
list.query: SELECT sid FROM stations ORDER BY sid
